headline: Canaccord Calls AbbVie a Core Holding With a $262 Target: Is This Biopharma’s Most Durable Compounder?
summary: One of Wall Street’s top firms just made the bull case for AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) stock, initiating coverage with a Buy rating and a $262 price target. Canaccord calls AbbVie a “core holding” for large-cap biopharma investors, pointing to a “solid and visible” growth profile underpinned by three distinct franchise pillars. With shares trading near $205, ... Canaccord Calls AbbVie a Core Holding With a $262 Target: Is This Biopharma’s Most Durable Compounder?
